_language_help: One of the languages with a catalog at data/i18n/{lang}.json. Default: es.
_ebird_locale_help: Optional override for the eBird API locale (e.g. 'pt_BR'). If null, derived from `language`.
_description_policy_help: How to render descriptions when no source produces text in the configured language. One of: strict | foreign_fallback | skip. Default: foreign_fallback.
_max_feed_entries_help: Maximum entries in feed.xml. 0 = unlimited (full history). Set via BOTD_MAX_FEED_ENTRIES for Docker.
_feed_link_help: Base URL of your deployed site (e.g. 'https://birds.example.com/'). Used for absolute URLs in the RSS feed.
_content_mode_help: One of: programmatic (scrape-only, no LLM) | enriched (LLM generates cohesive text from scraped sources). Default: programmatic.
_llm_help: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. API key via BOTD_LLM_API_KEY env var.
